title: Preciva Heavy Duty Staple Gun,Staple Nail Gun Kit with Remover and 1800PCS Staples，for Fixing Material, Decoration, Carpentry,Wood, Crafts
features: 【New Nailing Style】- The use of trigger up nailing makes it easier to drive the nails completely into the wood. Unlike nailers on the market, this model has a unique design that makes it easier to drive nails completely into the wood

【Visual Quick Release Metal Nail Bin】- This nail gun is equipped with a quick-release metal nail compartment, which makes changing nails easier and faster; equipped with a nail observation window, which allows you to see whether the nails are running out without disassembling the nail compartment, so that you can change nails quickly.

【Non-slip Lightweight Material】- Carbon steel + aluminium + ABS material, compared with the old model, the overall weight is greatly reduced, the use of ergonomic curved handle with TPU handle sleeve, not only non-slip, but also can greatly reduce hand fatigue

【Fully Convex Nail Head】- Adopting steel fully convex nail head, it is not easy to jam the nails when hitting the nails and make the force of nails more even when nailing, it is easier for the nails to penetrate and be more flat.

【Products Include】Working stroke for 6-14mm11.2mm door nails x600, 10.6mm door nails x600, T nails x600, nailer x1, nailing gun x1. working stroke for 6-14mm, note: the models are not suitable for U-shaped nails.
